case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. SERGIO GARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, SERGIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2791 - 16TH STREET #18 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68896251)
